fields.description: Default duration for a new visit stop, in seconds.
fields.label: Default Visit Duration

fields.description: Distance from target above which a Meet is flagged off_target and a comment is required.
fields.label: Off-target Threshold (meters)

fields.description: Auto check-in radius around a planned visit point.
fields.label: Geofence Radius (meters)

fields.description: Mobile heartbeat ping interval in seconds.
fields.label: Heartbeat Interval (seconds)

fields.description: An open Meet older than this gets auto-closed as No-show.
fields.label: Abandoned Check-in Sweep (minutes)

fields.description: On Meet submit with visit_type=Service, post a Stock Entry for parts_used rows.
fields.label: Auto-create Stock Entry for service parts

fields.description: Google Maps gives the best UX and works in the PWA. Add your API key below. Falls back to OpenStreetMap automatically when no key is set.
fields.label: Maps Provider
fields.options:
Google
OpenStreetMap
OpenRouteService
OSRM
Mapbox
HERE

fields.description: Required for Google Maps / Mapbox / HERE. For Google, restrict the key to HTTP referrers + the Maps JS, Geocoding, and Distance Matrix APIs in your Google Cloud project.
fields.label: Maps API Key

fields.description: OSRM base URL, e.g. https://router.project-osrm.org or your self-hosted server.
fields.label: OSRM Server URL

fields.description: Where the "Open in Maps" button takes the agent.
fields.label: Directions Provider
fields.options:
Google Maps URL
Mapbox URL
OpenStreetMap (browser)

fields.description: Allow address → lat/lng lookups via the configured provider.
fields.label: Enable Geocoding

fields.description: If on, route optimization uses the provider's distance matrix (road distances). Off = Haversine.
fields.label: Enable Road-distance Optimization

fields.description: Required by Nominatim's terms when using OSM geocoding.
fields.label: Nominatim User-Agent
